ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_number" TEXT /* Unique incident number assigned by the police department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the incident occurred */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resolution status of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_unit" TEXT /* Unit or team assigned to handle the incident */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who reported the incident */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  "reported_time" TEXT /* Time the incident was reported */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the incident */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the district */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "chief_name" TEXT /* Name of the district chief */,
  "chief_email" TEXT /* Email of the district chief */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident category (e.g., Minor, Major, Critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution status */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution status */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the incident was resolved */,
  "resolving_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who resolved the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_resolving_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolving_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, detective, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., update, close, reopen) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "action_taken_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who took the action */,
  "action_taken_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_taken_time" TEXT /* Time the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of evidence */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the evidence is associated with */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., photo, video, document) */,
  "evidence_description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the evidence was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the evidence was collected */,
  "stored_location" TEXT /* Location where the evidence is stored */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the officer who collected the evidence */,
  "evidence_status" TEXT /* Status of the evidence (e.g., In Storage, Analyzed, Returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the suspect is associated with */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Full name of the suspect */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect (e.g., physical appearance, known aliases) */,
  "arrested" INTEGER /* Whether the suspect has been arrested */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date the suspect was arrested */,
  "arrest_time" TEXT /* Time the suspect was arrested */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the suspect */,
  "suspect_status" TEXT /* Status of the suspect (e.g., At Large, In Custody) */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who arrested the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspects_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspects_arresting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the victim is associated with */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "victim_description" TEXT /* Description of the victim (e.g., physical appearance, known relationships) */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Whether the victim was injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details of the victim's injuries */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the victim */,
  "victim_status" TEXT /* Status of the victim (e.g., Safe, Hospitalized, Deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the witness is associated with */,
  "witness_name" TEXT /* Full name of the witness */,
  "witness_description" TEXT /* Description of the witness (e.g., physical appearance, known relationships) */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Statement provided by the witness */,
  "witness_status" TEXT /* Status of the witness (e.g., Available, Unavailable, Deceased) */,
  "witness_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the witness */,
  "witness_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the witness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_witnesses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case file */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the file is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the case file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, Image, Video) */,
  "file_owner" TEXT /* Name of the user who owns the file */,
  "file_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the file (e.g., Public, Confidential, Classified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer assignment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the officer is assigned to */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was assigned to the incident */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Time the officer was assigned to the incident */,
  "officer_status" TEXT /* Status of the officer (e.g., Active, On Leave, Retired) */,
  "officer_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer (e.g., Officer, Detective, Sergeant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external party */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the external party is involved in */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the external party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the external party (e.g., role, relationship to the incident) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the external party */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the external party */,
  "party_status" TEXT /* Status of the external party (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "party_role" TEXT /* Role of the external party (e.g., Legal, Medical, Forensic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_parties_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
